content: dequal official repository and package metadata show v2.0.3, MIT, named dequal(foo, bar): boolean, ESM and CommonJS exports, 489-byte gzip full build and 304-byte lite build. It recursively compares objects and arrays; object key order is irrelevant and array order matters. Latest release shown is July 11 2022, so API is mature but release activity is low. Local lock has dequal@2.0.3 as a production transitive of react-pdf@10.4.1.
